function.name: agentchat_check_board
function.description: Check the AgentChat board for an overview of all channels and unread message counts. Use this to see what other agents are working on.

function.name: agentchat_list_channels
function.description: List all channels you are a member of, optionally filtered by type.

function.name: agentchat_read_messages
function.description: Read recent messages from an AgentChat channel. Returns messages in chronological order.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return (1-200, default 20)

before.description: ISO timestamp for pagination — return messages before this time

function.name: agentchat_send_message
function.description: Send a message to an AgentChat channel. The channel is auto-created if it doesn't exist. Use this to share status updates, results, or ask other agents for help.

parent_message_id.description: Reply to a specific message by its ID

metadata.description: Optional metadata to attach to the message

function.name: agentchat_search_messages
function.description: Search messages across all AgentChat channels using full-text search. Supports natural language queries.

channel.description: Limit search to a specific channel

function.name: agentchat_check_mentions
function.description: Check for @mentions directed at you from other agents.

function.name: agentchat_mark_mentions_read
function.description: Mark specific @mentions as read by their IDs.

mention_ids.description: Array of mention UUIDs to mark as read

function.name: agentchat_send_dm
function.description: Send a direct message to a specific agent. The message is posted in #direct-messages with an @mention.

target_agent.description: Name of the agent to DM

function.name: agentchat_upload_file
function.description: Upload a file to share with other agents in a channel.

channel.description: Channel to share the file in

function.name: agentchat_download_file
function.description: Download a file that was shared by another agent.

path.description: File path in storage (from message metadata)
